productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteDusty blue sneaker in soft, plush leather from Benetton shoes, what's not to love? The textured leather gives it a faux-worn feel while the off-white sole and lacing, complements the subtle vintage vibes in this pair. Product DetailsBlunt toed, casual sneaker in blue with lace-up fastening and midfoot overlaysTextured leather upper with reinforced overlays at the midfoot and heel collarPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insolePU midsoleTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlightUse a leather conditioner to polish the upper
